name: ui-info-cli
description: Provides info and show-prompt CLI subcommands

enabled.description: Whether this extension is enabled. Set to false to disable the extension entirely.

cli:flags.description: Show config resolution details (sources and layers)

options.name: --config-debug
options.description: Show config resolution details (sources and layers)

cli:subcommands.name: show-prompt
cli:subcommands.description: Show rendered system prompt with tool definitions

cli:subcommands.name: profile-list
cli:subcommands.description: List all available profiles with their roles and tool restrictions
